stemHtml: The following might be caused by antenna shadowing:

options.a: A weather radar failing to show a distant turbulent cloud due to the signals being blocked by a nearer cloud.
options.b: Poor radio reception of a VOR ident signal while the aircraft is making an orbit (360° medium-level turn).
options.c: An aircraft appearing as two distinct Indications on a radar controller's display.
options.d: Blocking of a VOR transmission caused by buildings close to the antenna.
